notes: Shard-scoped authority sidecar for Paper 2 March watermarked rows.
Uses checked-in component-scoped 9709.p2.* topic paths from the P2/P4 runtime seed extension.
Does not merge P2 into P3; cross-paper syllabus subset remains a boundary note only.
Watermarked-source status is tracked as review evidence and is not an automatic blocker after accepted visual disposition.
